_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: The levels of Parkin, PINK1, POLG, and MPV17L2 were significantly decreased in all four MPNST cell lines...albeit a significant decrease in the levels in S462TY and STS26T cells
details: Significantly decreased mRNA expression levels of Parkin, PINK1, POLG, MPV17L2, and PGC1α after FT895 treatment
